backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining BlogPost and Comment types with CRUD operations for blog posts, comment management, and blob storage integration via MixinStorage.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the requirement to change all text colors to black across the website, targeting frontend/src/index.css and frontend/tailwind.config.js.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend files describing component structure, routing, styling with black text colors, blog functionality, and responsive typography improvements.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS with Tailwind layers defining OKLCH color variables for light and dark modes, including foreground colors set to near-black values for text elements.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the AyurGlow Secrets application with root div and module script reference to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React application component configuring TanStack Router with all routes for home, about, category pages, remedy subcategories, blog pages, admin pages, and legal pages, wrapped with QueryClientProvider.
frontend/src/components/BlogSidebar.tsx: Blog sidebar component with remedy search functionality, popular posts list, and category display using cards and badges with ocean-blue/sage-green theming.
frontend/src/components/CommentSection.t: Comment section component displaying existing comments and providing a form to add new comments with author name and content, using earth-green/sage-green styling.
frontend/src/components/FeaturedPost.tsx: Displays a large featured blog post card with image overlay, title, excerpt, category badge, publish date, read time, and hover effects. Links to the full post detail page using the post slug.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site footer with four columns: About section with logo, Quick Links navigation, Categories links, and Newsletter signup with social media icons. Includes copyright and attribution information.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Provides the main layout wrapper component that combines Navigation, Footer, and page content in a flex column structure with cream background.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Implements responsive navigation bar with logo, desktop menu links, categories dropdown, admin link, and mobile hamburger menu. Highlights active routes and provides sticky positioning.
frontend/src/components/PostCard.tsx: Renders a blog post card component with image, category badge, title, excerpt, publish date, and read time. Features hover effects and links to the post detail page.
frontend/src/components/SearchBar.tsx: Provides a search input component with search icon, clear button, and keyboard navigation support (Enter, Escape, ArrowDown). Accepts callbacks for various user interactions.
frontend/src/components/SearchResults.ts: Displays search results in a dropdown overlay with keyboard navigation (arrow keys, Enter, Escape). Shows result count, titles, keywords, and category badges with click and keyboard selection support.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that manages the backend actor instance based on Internet Identity authentication state. Creates authenticated or anonymous actors and invalidates dependent queries when identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React hook and provider for Internet Identity authentication on ICP, managing login state, identity persistence, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query hooks for blog post CRUD operations (get all/published/single posts, create, update, delete) and comment management, using the actor from useActor hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useRemedySearch.ts: Custom hook providing search functionality for Ayurvedic remedy pages across health, skin care, and hair care categories with keyword-based filtering.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom green-themed color palette for light/dark modes, typography hierarchy using Playfair Display and Inter fonts, and utility classes for earth-toned Ayurvedic design.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClient and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the main App component.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: About page component describing AyurGlow Secrets' mission, philosophy, and offerings with hero section and three content cards featuring Ayurvedic wellness information.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPostsPage.tsx: Admin dashboard page for managing blog posts with list view, delete confirmation dialog, and navigation to create/edit post pages. Uses useGetAllPosts and useDeletePost hooks with loading and error states.
frontend/src/pages/BlogPage.tsx: Public blog listing page displaying published posts in a grid layout with sidebar. Uses useGetPublishedPosts hook and renders PostCard components with loading and empty states.
frontend/src/pages/BlogPostDetailPage.ts: Individual blog post detail page showing full post content with featured image, metadata, sidebar, and comment section. Fetches post by slug from useGetPublishedPosts and handles not-found cases.
frontend/src/pages/CreateBlogPostPage.ts: Form page for creating new blog posts with rich text editor (ReactQuill), featured image upload, and inline content image handling. Converts uploaded images to ExternalBlob and uses useCreatePost mutation.
frontend/src/pages/EditBlogPostPage.tsx: Form page for editing existing blog posts, pre-populating fields from useGetPost hook. Handles both new image uploads and existing ExternalBlob images with ReactQuill editor for content.
frontend/src/pages/hair-care/DandruffSca: React page component displaying dandruff and scalp care remedies with hero section, back navigation, and cards showing 4 natural treatments (neem-tea tree, lemon-yogurt, fenugreek-curd, aloe vera-coconut) with ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency.
frontend/src/pages/hair-care/GreyHairSol: React page component for grey hair solutions featuring 4 Ayurvedic remedies (curry leaves-coconut oil, amla-henna, black tea-coffee rinse, bhringraj-brahmi) with detailed ingredients, application instructions, benefits, and usage frequency for preventing and reversing premature greying.
frontend/src/pages/hair-care/HairFallTre: React page component presenting 4 hair fall treatment remedies (onion juice, fenugreek seeds, amla-shikakai, curry leaves-coconut oil) with structured cards containing ingredients, step-by-step application, benefits, and recommended frequency for reducing hair loss.
frontend/src/pages/hair-care/HairGrowthP: React page component showcasing 4 hair growth remedies (castor-coconut oil blend, aloe vera-bhringraj, egg-yogurt protein, hibiscus-curry leaves) with detailed ingredients, application methods, benefits, and frequency to stimulate healthy hair growth using Ayurvedic treatments.
frontend/src/pages/hair-care/OilsMasksPa: React page component displaying 5 hair oil and mask treatments (hot oil treatment, brahmi-amla oil, banana-avocado mask, hibiscus-fenugreek mask, neem-tulsi scalp oil) with comprehensive ingredients, application steps, benefits, and usage frequency for deep conditioning and nourishment.
frontend/src/pages/HairCarePage.tsx: Landing page for hair care category displaying subcategories (hair fall, growth, dandruff, grey hair, oils/masks) as clickable cards with icons and descriptions. Static content with navigation links to subcategory pages.
frontend/src/pages/health-remedies/Diabe: React page component displaying Ayurvedic remedies for diabetes and blood pressure management, including fenugreek water, bitter gourd juice, cinnamon-honey tonic, and garlic-lemon remedy with ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency.

Alternative diabetes and blood pressure support page using Card components with similar remedies (fenugreek, bitter gourd, cinnamon tea, garlic-ginger), featuring a hero section, back navigation, and important medical disclaimer alert.
frontend/src/pages/health-remedies/Diges: React page for digestive and gut health remedies featuring Triphala churna, ginger-lemon tonic, ajwain water, and buttermilk with cumin, displayed in Card components with hero section and navigation.

Digestive health remedies page showcasing Triphala powder, ginger-lemon tonic, CCF tea (cumin-coriander-fennel), and ajwain water with icons, ingredients, application steps, benefits, and usage frequency.
frontend/src/pages/health-remedies/Immun: Displays immunity-boosting Ayurvedic remedies including Golden Turmeric Milk, Amla Juice, Tulsi Tea, and Chyawanprash with ingredients, preparation steps, benefits, and usage instructions.

Immunity boosting remedies page featuring turmeric golden milk, tulsi-ginger tea, Chyawanprash tonic, and amla-honey shot with detailed preparation instructions and SEO-optimized heading for natural immunity enhancement.
frontend/src/pages/health-remedies/Stres: Presents stress relief and sleep remedies like Ashwagandha Moon Milk, Brahmi-Tulsi Tea, Chamomile-Lavender Blend, and Almond-Saffron Milk with ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency.
Similar to StressSleepPage, displays calming Ayurvedic remedies for stress and sleep with detailed preparation instructions, benefits, and usage guidance in a card-based layout.
frontend/src/pages/health-remedies/Weigh: Shows weight management remedies including Lemon-Honey Water, Triphala-Guggul Formula, Ginger-Green Tea, and Cabbage-Carrot Juice with metabolism-boosting benefits and application instructions.
frontend/src/pages/HealthRemediesPage.ts: Landing page for Health Remedies category displaying five subcategories (Immunity, Digestion, Weight Management, Diabetes/BP, Stress/Sleep) in a grid with icons and links to detailed pages.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Main homepage with hero banner, featured post, recent posts grid, and category exploration section; fetches and displays published blog posts using React Query.
frontend/src/pages/PrivacyPolicyPage.tsx: Privacy policy page with sections on information collection, usage, cookies, and data protection; includes back navigation and formatted card layout.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/AcnePimples: Provides acne and pimple treatment remedies like Neem-Turmeric Face Pack, Tea Tree Oil Spot Treatment, Sandalwood-Rose Water Paste, and Aloe Vera-Lemon Gel with detailed application steps and benefits.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/AcneTreatme: React page component displaying four Ayurvedic acne treatment remedies (neem-turmeric, tea tree-aloe, sandalwood-rosewater, cinnamon-honey) with ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency information in a card-based layout.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/AntiAgingPa: React page component presenting four anti-aging remedies (almond-saffron serum, avocado-honey mask, rose water-glycerin tonic, papaya-yogurt mask) with detailed ingredients, application instructions, benefits, and usage frequency in a structured card layout.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/DIYFacePack: React page component showcasing five DIY face pack recipes (multani mitti, besan-turmeric, oatmeal-honey, sandalwood-rose, banana-honey) categorized by skin type with ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency recommendations.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/NaturalGlow: React page component featuring four natural glow remedies (turmeric-yogurt mask, saffron-milk treatment, aloe vera-rose water toner, papaya-honey mask) with ingredients, application methods, benefits, and usage frequency in a card-based interface.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/Pigmentatio: React page component displaying four remedies for pigmentation and dark spots (lemon-honey mask, potato-cucumber juice, almond-milk cream, orange peel-yogurt pack) with hero section, back navigation, and detailed remedy cards including ingredients, application, benefits, and frequency.
React component displaying Ayurvedic remedies for pigmentation reduction, including four natural treatments with ingredients, application steps, benefits, and usage frequency.
frontend/src/pages/SkinCarePage.tsx: Landing page for Skin Care category displaying five subcategories (Natural Glow, Acne, Pigmentation, Anti-Aging, DIY Face Packs) in a grid with icons and navigation links.
frontend/src/pages/TermsOfServicePage.ts: Terms of service page with medical disclaimer alert and sections covering agreement to terms, website use, and legal provisions; includes back navigation and card-based layout.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom colors (including earth-green, sage-green variants), typography settings with Inter and Playfair Display fonts, spacing, animations, and design tokens using CSS variables.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file documenting pending feature requests to change all text to black color and reduce font size of immunity boosting page heading for better visibility over background images.
